visual_description: In a dimly lit, green-hued interior, the camera focuses on a close-up of two men in conversation. The man on the right, who is the primary focus, is middle-aged with short, graying hair. He wears a light-colored suit jacket over a collared shirt. His expression is serious and concerned as he looks at the other man. The man on the left is seen in profile, slightly out of focus. He has dark hair and is wearing a patterned, possibly sequined, shirt. The background is blurry and indistinct, suggesting a cluttered or industrial space. In the upper left corner of the screen, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the interaction between the two individuals. A man speaks in a low, slightly raspy voice, his tone calm and conversational as he says, "Maybe like... Jia Yi." Another man responds with a short, questioning "Hmm?" in a similarly low and inquisitive tone. The background is quiet, with no discernible music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the intimate and serious dialogue between the two men.
